page.content: The analysis reveals significant data across two tables, beginning with Table 1, which includes headers such as Longest duration of oliguria, Days with AKI-Cr next 2 days, Days with no AKI-Cr next 2 days, Sens., Spec., PPV, NPV, LR, P, and RR of AKI. The row labeled None shows 9 Days with AKI-Cr next 2 days and 439 Days with no AKI-Cr next 2 days, with no values for Sens., Spec., PPV, NPV, LR, P, or RR of AKI. The row labeled ≥1 hr has 26 Days with AKI-Cr next 2 days, 249 Days with no AKI-Cr next 2 days, Sens. of 0.74, Spec. of 0.63, PPV of 0.09, NPV of 0.98, LR of 2.1, P < 0.001, and RR of AKI of 4.7. The row labeled ≥2 hr shows 22 Days with AKI-Cr next 2 days, 187 Days with no AKI-Cr next 2 days, Sens. of 0.62, Spec.
